name: Pickled Peppers or Chiles
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 lb Red or green sweet peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the peppers or chilies thoroughly.
2. Cut around the stem of each large pepper and pull out the stem with attached core and seeds. Leave the peppers whole or cut them into sections or strips, as desired. Hot chilies may be stemmed and seeded, or left whole with stems intact.
3. Mix the vinegar and water; heat to a simmer (150°F to 160°F). The vinegar should not be allowed to boil.
4. Add the salt.
5. Pack the peppers or chilies rather tightly into jars.
6. Pour the hot vinegar mixture over the peppers to within 1/2 inch of the jar rims, or if using olive oil, pour the vinegar to within 3/4 inch of the rim and then add oil to within 1/2 inch of the rims. The peppers will be coated with oil when used.
7. Cover jars and process for 15 minutes in a boiling water bath.
